subject: Massive red mechanical/robotic giant in a power stance, fist raised
description: An enormous red robotic or mechanical humanoid figure dominates the frame, posed in a power stance with one massive fist raised or thrust forward. The figure is almost entirely red, with large chunky mechanical limbs and a roughly humanoid shape. Energy beams and light effects radiate from the body and the background, rendered in red, orange, and white. The scale of the figure relative to the frame conveys extraordinary power and size.
foreground: Massive red robotic humanoid, fist raised, energy radiating from body
